mapper.select:
select id, function_id as functionId, function_name as functionName, source_type as sourceType, prompt_text as promptText, result_text as resultText, model_name as modelName, prompt_tokens as promptTokens, completion_tokens as completionTokens, total_tokens as totalTokens, latency_ms as latencyMs, strategy, run_index as runIndex, previous_record_id as previousRecordId, creator_id as creatorId, creator_role as creatorRole, manager_id as managerId, create_time as createTime, evaluation_score as evaluationScore, normal_path_coverage as normalPathCoverage, boundary_coverage as boundaryCoverage, exception_coverage as exceptionCoverage, syntax_norm as syntaxNorm, suggestion_text as suggestionText, tester_case_count as testerCaseCount, llm_case_count as llmCaseCount, tester_evaluation_score as testerEvaluationScore, line_coverage as lineCoverage, branch_coverage as branchCoverage, coverage_status as coverageStatus, coverage_message as coverageMessage, public_compare_result as publicCompareResult, public_covered_count as publicCoveredCount, public_partial_count as publicPartialCount, public_missing_count as publicMissingCount, public_extra_result as publicExtraResult, generated_case_count as generatedCaseCount, public_matched_case_count as publicMatchedCaseCount, public_extra_case_count as publicExtraCaseCount, public_invalid_case_count as publicInvalidCaseCount, public_extra_rate as publicExtraRate, public_expand_rate as publicExpandRate from generate_record
and function_name like concat('%', #{functionName}, '%')
and model_name like concat('%', #{modelName}, '%')
and strategy = #{strategy}
and ( (creator_role = 'ADMIN' and creator_id = #{currentUserId}) or (creator_role = 'USER' and manager_id = #{currentUserId}) )
and ( creator_role = 'USER' and creator_id = #{currentUserId} )
order by id desc

select id, function_id as functionId, function_name as functionName, source_type as sourceType, prompt_text as promptText, result_text as resultText, model_name as modelName, prompt_tokens as promptTokens, completion_tokens as completionTokens, total_tokens as totalTokens, latency_ms as latencyMs, strategy, run_index as runIndex, previous_record_id as previousRecordId, creator_id as creatorId, creator_role as creatorRole, manager_id as managerId, create_time as createTime, evaluation_score as evaluationScore, normal_path_coverage as normalPathCoverage, boundary_coverage as boundaryCoverage, exception_coverage as exceptionCoverage, syntax_norm as syntaxNorm, suggestion_text as suggestionText, tester_case_count as testerCaseCount, llm_case_count as llmCaseCount, tester_evaluation_score as testerEvaluationScore, line_coverage as lineCoverage, branch_coverage as branchCoverage, coverage_status as coverageStatus, coverage_message as coverageMessage, public_compare_result as publicCompareResult, public_covered_count as publicCoveredCount, public_partial_count as publicPartialCount, public_missing_count as publicMissingCount, public_extra_result as publicExtraResult, generated_case_count as generatedCaseCount, public_matched_case_count as publicMatchedCaseCount, public_extra_case_count as publicExtraCaseCount, public_invalid_case_count as publicInvalidCaseCount, public_extra_rate as publicExtraRate, public_expand_rate as publicExpandRate from generate_record where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into generate_record (function_id, function_name, source_type, prompt_text, result_text, model_name, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, latency_ms, strategy, run_index, previous_record_id, creator_id, creator_role, manager_id, evaluation_score, normal_path_coverage, boundary_coverage, exception_coverage, syntax_norm, suggestion_text, tester_case_count, llm_case_count, tester_evaluation_score, line_coverage, branch_coverage, coverage_status, coverage_message) values (#{functionId}, #{functionName}, #{sourceType}, #{promptText}, #{resultText}, #{modelName}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{latencyMs}, #{strategy}, #{runIndex}, #{previousRecordId}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorRole}, #{managerId}, #{evaluationScore}, #{normalPathCoverage}, #{boundaryCoverage}, #{exceptionCoverage}, #{syntaxNorm}, #{suggestionText}, #{testerCaseCount}, #{llmCaseCount}, #{testerEvaluationScore}, #{lineCoverage}, #{branchCoverage}, #{coverageStatus}, #{coverageMessage})
mapper.update: update generate_record set evaluation_score = #{evaluationScore}, normal_path_coverage = #{normalPathCoverage}, boundary_coverage = #{boundaryCoverage}, exception_coverage = #{exceptionCoverage}, syntax_norm = #{syntaxNorm}, suggestion_text = #{suggestionText} where id = #{id}

update generate_record set public_compare_result = #{publicCompareResult}, public_covered_count = #{publicCoveredCount}, public_partial_count = #{publicPartialCount}, public_missing_count = #{publicMissingCount}, public_extra_result = #{publicExtraResult}, generated_case_count = #{generatedCaseCount}, public_matched_case_count = #{publicMatchedCaseCount}, public_extra_case_count = #{publicExtraCaseCount}, public_invalid_case_count = #{publicInvalidCaseCount}, public_extra_rate = #{publicExtraRate}, public_expand_rate = #{publicExpandRate} where id = #{id}
